content: Users  Table of contents Frequently asked questions about managing users from policy. How do I ensure that a local user is locked? To ensure that a local user exists but is locked (for example a service account) simply specify policy => "locked" . code bundle agent service_accounts { vars : " users " slist => { "apache" , "libuuid" }; users : !windows :: " $(users) " policy => "locked" ; }
title: Users
headers: Users  How do I ensure that a local user is locked?
